LanguageData.UB_SNS_ZombieSurvivor.title: Zombie survivor
LanguageData.UB_SNS_ZombieSurvivor.description: [PAWN_nameDef] had to struggle to survive on an Urbworld overrun with an unknown contagious virus. [PAWN_nameDef] had to run, shoot, and scavenge what [PAWN_pronoun] could to survive, never settling down in one spot for too long.
